'''wathïfthïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibril|fibril]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibril|fibril]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| wathïfthïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wæthïfthïfth || wæthïfthïfj || wæthïfthïfsh || wæthïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wathïfthïfthïfth || wathïfthïfthïfj || wathïfthïfthïfsh || wathïfthïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wathïfthïfth || wathïfthïfj || wathïfthïfsh || wathïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wathïffthïffth || wathïffthïffj || wathïffthïffsh || wathïffthïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || wathïfthïfïf || wathïfthïfïf || wathïfthïfïf || wathïfthïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || wathïfthïfth || wathïfthïfj || wathïfthïfsh || wathïfthïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || wathïfthïfïfl || wathïfthïfïfl || wathïfthïfïfl || wathïfthïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || wathïfthïfïfïf || wathïfthïfïfïf || wathïfthïfïfïf || wathïfthïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || wathïfthïfïfn || wathïfthïfïfn || wathïfthïfïfn || wathïfthïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || wathïfthïfïforo || wathïfthïfïforo || wathïfthïfïforo || wathïfthïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
